source.name: JEE (Advanced) 2026 Syllabus
source.note: The official PDF states that the JEE Advanced 2026 syllabus remains the same as JEE Advanced 2025.

meta.structure_note: Chapters follow the official syllabus headings. Topics and subtopics break each official line item into trackable checklist units for a dashboard.
meta.class_mapping_note: class_tags are curriculum-aligned tags added for tracking; the official syllabus itself is not published class-wise.

topics.name: Experimental Physics
subtopics: Determination of g using simple pendulum
Effect of detergents on surface tension
Specific heat of a liquid using calorimeter
Focal length of a concave mirror by u-v method
Focal length of a convex lens by u-v method
Speed of sound using resonance column
Verification of Ohm's law using voltmeter and ammeter
Specific resistance of a wire using meter bridge
Specific resistance using post office box

topics.name: Motion in One and Two Dimensions
subtopics: Kinematics in two dimensions in Cartesian coordinates

chapters.name: Laws of Motion, Work, Energy and Momentum
System of Particles and Rigid Body Dynamics

topics.name: Rotational Dynamics
subtopics: Moment of inertia of uniform simple bodies
Dynamics of rigid bodies with fixed axis
Collision of point masses with rigid bodies

topics.name: Gravitation
subtopics: Motion of planets in circular orbits
Motion of satellites in circular orbits

topics.name: Kinetic Theory and Thermodynamics
subtopics: Applications of first law for ideal gases

topics.name: Electric Charges and Fields
subtopics: Electrical potential energy of point charge systems
Electrical potential energy of dipoles in uniform electrostatic field
Field due to infinitely long straight wire using Gauss's law
Field due to uniformly charged infinite plane sheet
Field due to uniformly charged thin spherical shell

chapters.name: Magnetism and Magnetic Effects of Current

topics.name: Magnetic Field due to Current
subtopics: Magnetic field near a current-carrying straight wire
Magnetic field along the axis of a circular coil
Magnetic field inside a long straight solenoid

topics.name: Force and Magnetic Moment
subtopics: Force on a moving charge in uniform magnetic field
Force on a current-carrying wire in uniform magnetic field
Magnetic moment of a current loop
Effect of uniform magnetic field on a current loop

topics.name: Circuits with DC and AC Sources
subtopics: LCR series circuit with d.c. source
LCR series circuit with a.c. source

topics.name: Nucleus and Radioactivity
subtopics: Energy calculation in fission and fusion

topics.name: Photoelectricity and Atomic Models
subtopics: de Broglie wavelength of matter waves

chapters.name: States of Matter: Gases and Liquids

topics.name: Liquids and Intermolecular Forces
subtopics: Effect of intermolecular interactions on properties

topics.name: Quantum Model of Atom
subtopics: Quantum mechanical picture of hydrogen atom

topics.name: Bonding Models
subtopics: Molecular orbital energy diagrams for homonuclear diatomics up to Ne2

topics.name: Chemical Equilibrium
subtopics: Significance of Gibbs energy in equilibrium

topics.name: Rate of Reaction and Catalysis
subtopics: Differential rate equation for zero order reaction
Integrated rate equation for zero order reaction
Differential rate equation for first order reaction
Integrated rate equation for first order reaction

topics.name: Crystal Structure
subtopics: Cell parameters a, b, c, alpha, beta, gamma

chapters.name: Classification of Elements and Periodicity in Properties

topics.name: Periodic Trends
subtopics: Periodic trend in electron gain enthalpy

topics.name: Hydrogen and Its Compounds
subtopics: Position of hydrogen in periodic table

topics.name: Alkali and Alkaline Earth Metals
subtopics: Uses of alkali and alkaline earth metals
General characteristics of salts of oxoacids

topics.name: Important Compounds of Sodium and Calcium
General p-Block Trends
subtopics: Trends in chemical reactivity in groups 13 to 17

topics.name: Structure and Bonding
subtopics: Crystal field theory in octahedral field
Crystal field theory in tetrahedral field

topics.name: Properties and Applications
subtopics: Spin-only magnetic properties of 3d coordination compounds

topics.name: Fundamentals
subtopics: Compounds with up to two asymmetric centres
IUPAC nomenclature of simple cyclic hydrocarbons

subtopics: Effect of branching on physical properties

subtopics: Formation of quadratic equation with given roots

subtopics: Sum of first n natural numbers
Sum of squares of first n natural numbers
Sum of cubes of first n natural numbers
Binomial theorem for positive integral index

subtopics: Matrices as rectangular arrays of real numbers
Determinant of square matrix up to order three
Inverse of square matrix up to order three

subtopics: Frequency distribution with same mean but different variance

subtopics: Elementary properties of inverse trigonometric functions

subtopics: Equation of straight line in various forms
Distance of a point from a line
